protein_name: Catalytic component of the SRCAP complex which mediates the ATP-dependent exchange of histone H2AZ/H2B dimers for nucleosomal H2A/H2B, leading to transcriptional regulation of selected genes by chromatin remodeling. Acts as a coactivator for CREB-mediated transcription, steroid receptor-mediated transcription, and Notch-mediated transcription. Belongs to the SNF2/RAD54 helicase family. SWR1 subfamily. 3 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
